data.title: Famous NYE Popcorn Ball Drop in Chagrin Falls, Ohio named "Miss Sally" after founder. Unique small town tradition.
data.description: In Chagrin Falls, Ohio, the annual New Year's Eve event has a unique twist this year as it has been named "Miss Sally" in honor of the event's founder. This tradition stands out among other small towns' celebrations, with Chagrin Falls drawing inspiration from the iconic New York City ball drop. The event is set to captivate onlookers with its diverse festivities and promises an unforgettable experience.

data.title: PaXini Tech to showcase tactile sensing tech at CES 2026 in Las Vegas on Jan 6-9, 2026. #EmbodiedAI #CES2026
data.description: In Las Vegas on December 26, 2025, PaXini Tech revealed plans to showcase their advanced tactile sensing technologies and intelligence infrastructure at CES 2026 from January 6 to January 9, 2026, in the same city. The event will serve as a platform for PaXini to showcase their innovations to a wide audience.

data.title: Analysts predict Crypto ETFs to surge in 2026 with regulatory clarity in the US and lower interest rates fueling growth.
data.description: The crypto Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) market in the United States is poised for growth in 2026 due to increased regulatory transparency and the anticipated decrease in interest rates. These factors are expected to drive the market higher, with experts forecasting a substantial rise in investments and trading volumes within the industry.
Dave McCormick, a Congress member, has recently revealed new stock trades, including BITB. #stocktrades

data.title: BCH remains steady above $590 as $27B Bitcoin options expiry sparks market uncertainty.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Bitcoin Cash is currently being traded at $597.70, as it faces a record-high Bitcoin options expiry today with a total value of $27 billion. Despite concerns about a Trust Wallet hack dampening overall sentiment in the crypto market, Bitcoin Cash is demonstrating resilience.

data.title: US stocks mixed as Dow falls 0.1%, trading at 48,698.11, while NASDAQ rises 0.12% to 23,641.67, and S&P 500 up 0.11% to 6,939.71. Biohaven Ltd. shares fall post study results. Tech up 0.4%, industrials down 0.2%.
data.description: This morning, U.S. stocks showed mixed performance as the Dow Jones index fell by approximately 0.1% on Friday. At the opening of the market, the Dow was down by 0.07% to 48,698.11, contrasting with the NASDAQ's rise of 0.12% to 23,641.67. The S&P 500 also saw an increase by 0.11% to 6,939.71. Information technology sector shares experienced a notable increase of 0.4%, while industrial stocks declined by 0.2% in trading on Friday. Biohaven Ltd. (NYSE: BHVN) encountered a drop in shares on Friday following the release of results from a Phase 2 proof-of-concept study assessing BHV-7000 for major depressive disorder. For more detailed information, readers can find the full story on Benzinga.com.Note: This rephrased content is an original piece of writing and does not contain any content from the original source.

data.title: UNI price falls to $5.80 after 12% surge post-UNIfication proposal approval; 100M tokens burned & protocol fee switches on.
data.description: The price of UNI has decreased to $5.80 following a 12% surge caused by the approval of the UNIfication proposal. Additionally, a mechanism to burn 100 million tokens has been activated, along with switches for protocol fees.

data.title: Silver prices surged over 6% to $76 per ounce, with year-to-date gains at 164%, while platinum and palladium rose over 8% and 11% respectively. Gold reached above $4,550 an ounce, and copper climbed 4.6%.
data.description: During a quiet trading session on Wall Street after Christmas, the market saw explosive movement in precious and industrial metals. By midday in New York, silver prices, tracked by the iShares Silver Trust (NYSE: SLV), surged over 6% to surpass $76 per ounce due to a tightening supply in Asian markets. This rise resulted in silver's year-to-date increase hitting around 164%, marking its best performance since 1978. Platinum also saw a significant jump of over 8%, while palladium soared above 11%. The Aberdeen Physical Platinum Shares ETF (NYSE: PPLT) reported a 165% increase year to date, positioning platinum for its strongest year ever. Gold reached new highs with a 1.3% increase to exceed $4,550 per ounce, and copper also rose by 4.6%, recovering entirely from a previous selloff.

data.title: Chainlink price hovers at $12.25, testing key $11.74 support as traders await direction shift in sessions ahead.
data.description: The price of LINK remains stable at $12.25 amidst technical consolidation, as traders keep an eye on key support levels. Momentum indicators suggest a possible shift in direction in the upcoming sessions.

data.title: AVAX stays above $12 as JPMorgan entry hints at institutional shift; price at $12.28 amidst market calm.
data.description: The price of Avalanche (AVAX) is currently at $12.28 in a quiet market environment. JPMorgan's consideration of entering into crypto trading for institutions may enhance AVAX adoption, providing potential growth opportunities for the digital asset.

data.title: MATIC stabilizes at $0.38 with neutral technical signals during low holiday trading volume.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently experiencing a period of stability, with its value hovering around $0.38. There has been very little fluctuation in its price recently, and the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates a neutral market sentiment. MATIC's price is currently below important moving averages. These developments are occurring in a market characterized by low trading volume due to the holiday season.

data.title: BNB Chain's Fermi hard fork set for January launch to cut block times after successful testnet in November.
data.description: In November, the Fermi testnet was activated, paving the way for the mainnet rollout. This development led to a significant reduction in block times on the layer-1 blockchain network. With this progress, users can now experience faster transactions and increased efficiency on the network. This marks a crucial step forward in enhancing the overall performance of the blockchain system.

data.title: DOGE finds support at $0.12 post-holiday, trading down by 4.3%, as crypto market sees low volume.
data.description: The value of Dogecoin has dropped by 4.3% to $0.12 as the cryptocurrency market is back in action post-Christmas. Despite the decrease, Dogecoin is finding stability at important technical thresholds amid limited involvement from institutions in trading.

data.title: Peter Schiff mocks Bitcoin, calling recent rally a failure. Believes trade is over, praises gold and silver.
data.description: Peter Schiff has resumed his criticism of Bitcoin (BTC), declaring that the trade for the digital currency is finished due to its recent underwhelming price movement. In his comments on X, Schiff mocked what he referred to as a disappointing "crypto Christmas." Rather than experiencing the anticipated surge, Bitcoin remained stagnant while the prices of gold and silver increased. According to Schiff, one of the most successful trades in 2025 has been... data.title: Dow falls after record high, Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla stocks favorable. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following its record high closing on Wednesday. Three notable companies - Nvidia, Palantir, and Tesla - are currently considered to be in buy zones. This development comes after a period of notable volatility in the market.

data.title: ADA price stays at $0.35 with JPMorgan's crypto plans boosting sentiment. Key support at $0.35 awaits ADA.
data.description: After JPMorgan's move towards institutional crypto investments indicating wider acceptance, Cardano is currently being traded at $0.35. Technical analysis shows that ADA's price may face a critical support test soon.

data.title: Crypto analyst Benjamin Cowen predicts Bitcoin parallels to 2019 with macro headwinds, muted sentiment, and cycle dynamics, leading into 2026.
data.description: During an interview with Cointelegraph, a crypto analyst highlighted the factors influencing Bitcoin's trajectory up to 2026. These include macroeconomic headwinds, subdued sentiment, and cycle dynamics. This analysis suggests significant trends that may impact the future of Bitcoin over the next five years.

The Agenda: The future of multilateralism This week on CGTN Europe’s The Agenda, Juliet Mann examines the future of multilateralism — as we head into 2026, will the world see more or less global cooperation?

data.title: Global wedding ring market valued at US$56.7 billion in 2024, projected to reach US$80.7 billion by 2030, growing at 6.1% CAGR.
data.description: The latest addition to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings is the "Wedding Rings - Global Strategic Business Report." The global wedding rings market was worth US$56.7 billion in 2024 and is estimated to increase to US$80.7 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.1% from 2024 to 2030. This report offers a detailed examination of market trends, key drivers, and future forecasts to support strategic business decision-making. The growth of the wedding ring market is attributed to a combination of factors.
